# Every1Play Manager
`Credits to Open Steam Tool on Github for the .dll, i only made the UI / Application.`
## What is Every1Play Manager?

Automates the setup process for Open Steam Tools Usage (open source on GitHub).

* UI/UX built using code generated with ChatGPT
* Completely free to use
* Requires `.lua` and `.manifest` files to add game in Library.
* If you want to support development, you can purchase from [Every1Play](https://lynk.id/every1play), Bonus In-Game DLC!
* No Need to Turn Off / Add Exclusion Windows Defender!
---

# Features

## Install Tool

Functions:

* **Install Tool** =
  Copies required `.dll` files into the Steam folder

* **Uninstall Tool** =
  Removes installed `.dll` files from Steam folder

* **Restart Steam** =
  Closes Steam process and launches it again

* **Exit Steam** =
  Closes all Steam processes

<img width="852" alt="Install Tool" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c81772dc-4c0e-4951-b63d-737453bcf898">

---

## Add Game To Library

Functions:

* **Drop ZIP** =
  Extract ZIP and copy `.lua` files into: `steam/config/lua`


* **Game List** =
  Shows imported `.lua` entries

* **Delete All Game** =
  Removes all imported `.lua` files

<img width="819" alt="Library Tool" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7953dc02-3474-4fc8-a262-7b2f5361f65d">

---

## Fix Download Error

Functions:

* **Drop ZIP** =

Extract ZIP and copy `.manifest` files into: `steam/depotcache`

Used for temporary download/cache handling.

<img width="813" alt="Download Fix" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6b9426bb-c94e-4c75-b9db-9baec6047bcf">

---
